config.better-bundle.title: Better Bundle Configuration
config.better-bundle.option.showStackOve: Display item count and durability bar on items in the bundle panel
config.better-bundle.option.stackSameNbt: Merge items with same NBT data from different bundles in the GUI display
config.better-bundle.option.toggleButton: Position of the bundle panel toggle button
config.better-bundle.option.panelVisible: Toggle the bundle management panel visibility
